crime.value: Murder by heart removal - Tarra found dead in creek with large hole in chest where heart should be
crime.quote: I noticed a large whole in her chest where her heart should be. That's when I finally screamed bloody murder.

victim.value: Tarra, the mayor's daughter who had fought with her mother and went for a walk alone
victim.quote: She and mom had a fight last night so she went for a walk but hasn't come back.

closed_world.value: Small town of Tifton, Georgia with limited suspects from the neighborhood and local community
closed_world.quote: In the end we only had a few suspects... David's mother, my sister's boyfriend(Josh), and the chief of police.

culprit_and_motive.value: Damien suspected as culprit - has history of murdering young girls and previously tried to kill narrator
culprit_and_motive.quote: He tried to kill me and rape me before he was arrested for murders of young girls. I was the only one to make it out alive.

investigator.value: Sasha, the narrator - newcomer to town who discovers the body and conducts amateur investigation
investigator.quote: I'm trying to find some suspects. So I figured we should look at everyone's criminal records.

suspect_architecture.value: Four suspects identified: Damien (serial killer with history), David's mother, sister's boyfriend Josh, and chief of police
suspect_architecture.quote: The others in that list were; David's mother, my sister's boyfriend(Josh), and the chief of police.

red_herring.value: David's initial tenseness and explanation about Tarra's absence suggests potential misdirection about family dynamics
red_herring.quote: He tensed up,'She and mom had a fight last night so she went for a walk but hasn't come back.'

clue_fairness.value: Blood trail discovery and heart removal detail provided to reader simultaneously with protagonist's discovery
clue_fairness.quote: as I got out I noticed a trail of blood...I noticed a large whole in her chest where her heart should be.

social_world.value: Small town hierarchy with mayor's family, police authority, and newcomer/outsider dynamics creating power structures
social_world.quote: I became friends with the Mayors son, David, and his daughter, Tarra.

alibi.value: Damien's presence at welcome party establishes his proximity; narrator and David's joint discovery creates mutual alibi
alibi.quote: My sister's neighbor, Damien, kept to himself and stared at me the entire time

reveal_mechanic.value: Computer research revealing criminal backgrounds serves as investigative method for suspect identification
reveal_mechanic.quote: I'm trying to find some suspects. So I figured we should look at everyone's criminal records.

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's previous traumatic encounter with Damien in Louisiana creates personal vulnerability and connection to case
investigator_wound.quote: He tried to kill me and rape me before he was arrested for murders of young girls. I was the only one to make it out alive.

_meta.title: ebook tasha m the mystery of tifton georgia
